title: Use a formula to fill a column with the group name
excerpt: I want to add a column which adds the name of the group the item is in to each row within that group. I wanted to use the formula TEXT({Group}), but it has given me an error. Can you help?

posts.author: KateCWNN (Kate Wareham)
